lines.hearsay: A load sat unsigned at {place} for a good while.
lines.gossip: {A} counted {B}'s load against the docket at {place}, found it wanting, and signed for it anyway with a note in the margin — {A} keeps those notes, and one day {B} is going to find out how many.
lines.report: {A} signed for {B}'s load short at {place}, discrepancy noted, slot {slot}.
